release: Australia release documentation on developer.servicenow.com; unversioned endpoint (latest)

request_headers.Authorization: Basic <base64(user:password)> on every request to the instance origin

body.result: array of record objects; all field values are strings
the created record, including its server-assigned sys_id

query_encoding.url_encoding: the sysparm_query value is percent-encoded in the request line; '^' must arrive as %5E and '=' inside the value as %3D
query_encoding.offset_scan_rule: every query used with sysparm_offset pagination ends with ^ORDERBYsys_id so the scan order is stable across pages

error_envelope.client_rule: non-2xx responses raise SnowApiError with status_code, message and detail taken from this envelope

rate_limit.client_rule: on 429, call the injected sleep callable with the Retry-After value in seconds and retry the same request; after max_retries failed retries raise RateLimitError (a SnowApiError subclass) with .retry_after set

sync_rules.lookup_query: correlation_idIN<keys joined by ',' in input order>^ORDERBYsys_id
sync_rules.lookup_fields: sys_id, then the key field, then the remaining desired fields in sorted order
sync_rules.single_lookup: one lookup GET per sync run
sync_rules.patch_body: PATCH sends only the fields whose values differ from the existing record
sync_rules.identity: existing records are updated in place via their sys_id; a sync run never creates a second record for a correlation_id that already exists
sync_rules.idempotency: re-running sync with unchanged input performs zero POST/PATCH requests and reports every record as skipped

redirects.rule: Basic credentials are never forwarded to a different origin; on a cross-origin redirect the client either raises SnowApiError or follows without the Authorization header
